name: ObjectMode
summary: Defines enumerated values for the display and behavior of single objects.

enum_values.name: Hidden
enum_values.summary: Not visible, object cannot be selected or changed.

enum_values.name: Locked
enum_values.summary: Visible, object cannot be selected or changed.

enum_values.name: InstanceDefinitionObject
enum_values.summary: Object is part of an InstanceDefinition. The InstanceDefinition m_object_uuid[] array will contain this object attribute's id.
